criteria_verification.evidence: parse_guardkit_output() is defined and exported from src/forge/adapters/guardkit/parser.py. TestParserModuleSurface verifies the module path via inspect.getsourcefile and the function's __module__. AST inspection in test_parser_module_does_not_import_subprocess_wrapper additionally confirms the parser does not import any subprocess module — meeting the 'pure function on its inputs' Implementation Note.
criteria_verification.notes: parse_guardkit_output() is defined and exported from src/forge/adapters/guardkit/parser.py. TestParserModuleSurface verifies the module path via inspect.getsourcefile and the function's __module__. AST inspection in test_parser_module_does_not_import_subprocess_wrapper additionally confirms the parser does not import any subprocess module — meeting the 'pure function on its inputs' Implementation Note.

criteria_verification.evidence: Status arbitration in parse_guardkit_output() checks timed_out first; TestTimeoutTakesPrecedenceOverExitCode parametrises exit_code over [0, 1, -9, 124] and asserts status=='timeout' in every case. subcommand, exit_code, duration_secs, and stderr are all preserved on the timeout path.
criteria_verification.notes: Status arbitration in parse_guardkit_output() checks timed_out first; TestTimeoutTakesPrecedenceOverExitCode parametrises exit_code over [0, 1, -9, 124] and asserts status=='timeout' in every case. subcommand, exit_code, duration_secs, and stderr are all preserved on the timeout path.

criteria_verification.evidence: Status arbitration falls through to 'failed' when timed_out is False and exit_code is non-zero. stderr is propagated verbatim to GuardKitResult.stderr (or None when empty). TestNonZeroExitYieldsFailedWithStderr parametrises exit_code over [1, 2, 64, 127, 255] and verifies status=='failed' in every case, plus a verbatim stderr round-trip test.
criteria_verification.notes: Status arbitration falls through to 'failed' when timed_out is False and exit_code is non-zero. stderr is propagated verbatim to GuardKitResult.stderr (or None when empty). TestNonZeroExitYieldsFailedWithStderr parametrises exit_code over [1, 2, 64, 127, 255] and verifies status=='failed' in every case, plus a verbatim stderr round-trip test.

criteria_verification.evidence: Helper functions _extract_artefacts (## Artefacts section + '- /path' lines), _extract_coach_score (coach_score: <float> regex), _extract_criterion_breakdown (## Coach Breakdown markdown table with header-row filtering), and _extract_detection_findings (## Detection Findings JSON-fenced block) populate the optional fields. TestRecognisedShapeYieldsSuccessWithArtefacts asserts each helper individually plus a full-shape round-trip.
criteria_verification.notes: Helper functions _extract_artefacts (## Artefacts section + '- /path' lines), _extract_coach_score (coach_score: <float> regex), _extract_criterion_breakdown (## Coach Breakdown markdown table with header-row filtering), and _extract_detection_findings (## Detection Findings JSON-fenced block) populate the optional fields. TestRecognisedShapeYieldsSuccessWithArtefacts asserts each helper individually plus a full-shape round-trip.

criteria_verification.evidence: When no recognised section regex matches, all extractors return [] / None and status remains 'success'. TestUnrecognisedShapeDegradesToSuccessEmpty covers completely-unknown text, empty stdout, and binary-noise stdout, and asserts no exception escapes the parser.
criteria_verification.notes: When no recognised section regex matches, all extractors return [] / None and status remains 'success'. TestUnrecognisedShapeDegradesToSuccessEmpty covers completely-unknown text, empty stdout, and binary-noise stdout, and asserts no exception escapes the parser.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `stdout_tail` is the **last** 4 KB of stdout when stdout is larger
criteria_verification.evidence: _tail_bytes() returns the input verbatim when len(encoded) <= 4096 and otherwise slices encoded[-4096:]. TestStdoutTailTruncation covers small stdout (verbatim), exactly-4096-byte stdout (verbatim), large stdout (last 4096 bytes), and a leading/trailing-marker test that proves we kept the end and dropped the start.
criteria_verification.notes: _tail_bytes() returns the input verbatim when len(encoded) <= 4096 and otherwise slices encoded[-4096:]. TestStdoutTailTruncation covers small stdout (verbatim), exactly-4096-byte stdout (verbatim), large stdout (last 4096 bytes), and a leading/trailing-marker test that proves we kept the end and dropped the start.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Tail boundary is byte-based, not character-based (multi-byte UTF-8 is
criteria_verification.evidence: _tail_bytes() encodes to UTF-8, slices bytes, then decodes with errors='ignore'. test_multibyte_utf8_tail_is_byte_safe pads stdout with 2000 em-dashes (3 bytes each = 6000 bytes), invokes the parser, and asserts (a) no UnicodeDecodeError is raised, (b) the resulting tail re-encodes to <= 4096 bytes, and (c) every surviving character is a clean em-dash (no boundary mojibake).
criteria_verification.notes: _tail_bytes() encodes to UTF-8, slices bytes, then decodes with errors='ignore'. test_multibyte_utf8_tail_is_byte_safe pads stdout with 2000 em-dashes (3 bytes each = 6000 bytes), invokes the parser, and asserts (a) no UnicodeDecodeError is raised, (b) the resulting tail re-encodes to <= 4096 bytes, and (c) every surviving character is a clean em-dash (no boundary mojibake).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Internal parse errors (malformed JSON, etc.) are caught and surfaced
criteria_verification.evidence: Each helper invocation in parse_guardkit_output() is wrapped in try/except that builds a GuardKitWarning(code='parser_unrecognised_shape', message=..., details={context, exception_type, exception_message}). TestInternalErrorsBecomeWarningsNotRaises covers malformed JSON in detection_findings, a mock.patch-injected RuntimeError on _extract_artefacts, and asserts the warning carries diagnostic context. Status remains 'success' in every case.
criteria_verification.notes: Each helper invocation in parse_guardkit_output() is wrapped in try/except that builds a GuardKitWarning(code='parser_unrecognised_shape', message=..., details={context, exception_type, exception_message}). TestInternalErrorsBecomeWarningsNotRaises covers malformed JSON in detection_findings, a mock.patch-injected RuntimeError on _extract_artefacts, and asserts the warning carries diagnostic context. Status remains 'success' in every case.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero
criteria_verification.evidence: Project style rules per .claude/rules/code-style.md prescribe Black with line-length 88. Installed black 26.3.1 and ran 'python3 -m black --check --line-length 88 src/forge/adapters/guardkit/parser.py tests/forge/adapters/guardkit/test_parser.py' → output: '2 files would be left unchanged.' Both files were reformatted in this turn (modifications driven by black, not by hand) and the subsequent --check pass returns clean. Type hints (PEP 604 union syntax), snake_case functions, PascalCase classes, UPPER_CASE constants, and f-strings/list comprehensions are all in line with the documented style guide. pytest re-run after reformat: 38 passed.
